title: Smaller shields
description: A simple texture pack that changes the size of shields to be much small so your screen isn't covered
body:
# Lexi's Smaller Shields
A simple resource pack the replaces the shield model with a smaller version designed for pvp
Works for 1st person and 3rd person

Tested for 1.20 - 26.1

It may work on older versions

## Before 1st person
![Before, not blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/788c0df002dd8a417c9c8c12e48a1d5ac9348782_0.webp)
![Before, blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c336b76916a32888cc3f4cd4959df64ccb4e2a7_0.webp)

## After 1st person
![After, not blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbd6e6d0216a3984a58f14f9385efffc8cc66dad.png)
![After, blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cdc1faf049ee06dad0c951d00e6d0502f331c22.png)

## Before 3rd person
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb0bc74a2212cc70e6363520c5d0f1449efaaf36.png)

## After 3rd person
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af19aecc061ef5d776bbcc17557bba95af387bf4.png)
